bug: AudioContext leak - each startCamera call creates a new AudioContext that is never closed
fix: Store AudioContext in a ref and call audioContextRef.current.close() in the cleanup useEffect

bug: Raw stream audio tracks never stopped - rawStream audio tracks remain active after cleanStream is built
fix: Call rawStream.getAudioTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()) after building cleanStream

bug: 60s auto-stop timeout race condition - timeout captures recognitionRef.current at call time, toggling recording reassigns it, old timeout stops wrong instance
fix: Store timeout ID in a ref and clear it in onend/onerror. Check recognitionRef.current === recognition before stop()

bug: onerror handler ignores event.error - same generic message for all error types
fix: Change onerror to receive event parameter and check event.error for specific user messages

bug: Timer setInterval never cleared - analyzeResume returns cleanup but return value is never captured by React
fix: Use useRef for interval ID, clear it in cleanup useEffect and in generateReport

bug: WaveShaper threshold 0.02 clips quiet speech - words get dropped from recognition results
fix: Lower threshold or use BiquadFilterNode dynamic gate. Consider passing rawStream directly to SpeechRecognition

bug: Dual noise processing conflict - browser echoCancellation/noiseSuppression runs alongside custom pipeline, causing distortion
fix: Disable browser noise suppression in getUserMedia constraints or remove custom pipeline

bug: speechSynthesis has no onend handler and no try/catch - cannot track completion, throws from background tab
fix: Add utterance.onend handler and wrap speak call in try/catch

bug: Background tab silently stops recognition in Firefox - onend fires, user may not realize answer was never submitted
fix: Check isRecording still true in onend. Pause timer using document.visibilityState

bug: Video preview pipeline is ambiguous - no actual recording mechanism, intent unclear
fix: Add comment clarifying display-only use. Implement MediaRecorder if permanent recording is intended
